content.full_text:
December 11, 2007

Steven D. Hofbauer
Palmdale City Council Member
Via Facsimile Only (661) 722-7329

RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-189

Dear Mr. Hofbauer:

This letter is in response to your request for written advice of December 5, 2007. Your inquiry primarily presents issues which are outside the purview of the Political Reform Act ("Act")1. None of the statutes enacted in AB 1234 are Political Reform Act statutes. The Commission’s only role is to advise regarding the ethics training course content.

Since the Commission has no role in advising on the provisions of AB 1234 about which you inquire, pursuant to regulation 18329(b)(8)(D), copy enclosed, we must decline to advise. You may want to contact your agency counsel or the Attorney General’s Office for advice.

Should you have any additional questions regarding this matter, please contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division

JWW:jgl
Enclosure

1 Government Code sections 81000-91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109-18996, of the California code of Regulations.
